title: Flight of the Red Bandit
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo flies to the deserts of Arizona to find the mysterious Red Bandit and bring home a very special hat! ✈️

q.en: Who is the narrator of this story, and what is his job?
q.zh: 这个故事的讲述者是谁，他的职业是什么？

options.zh: 布鲁斯·鬣狗，是一名骡子向导

options.en: Geronimo Stilton, editor of The Rodent's Gazette
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩·斯提尔顿，是《鼠民公报》的编辑
赫拉克·波拉，是一名侦探

options.en: Trap Stilton, a taxi driver according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 特拉普·斯提尔顿，是一名出租车司机（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo says, 'My name is Stilton, Geronimo Stilton. I'm the editor of The Rodent's Gazette, the most famous newspaper on Mouse Island.'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说：“我叫斯提尔顿，杰罗尼摩·斯提尔顿。我是老鼠岛上最著名的报纸《鼠民公报》的编辑。”

q.en: What is Grandfather William Shortpaws also known as?
q.zh: 威廉·肖特波兹爷爷还有一个什么外号？

options.en: The Red Bandit according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 红盗贼（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: When the mouse bursts into Geronimo's office, the text says: 'That rodent was none other than my grandfather William Shortpaws, also known as Cheap Mouse Willie.'
explain.zh: 当那只老鼠冲进杰罗尼摩的办公室时，书里写道：“那只老鼠不是别人，正是我的爷爷威廉·肖特波兹，外号小气鼠威利。”

q.en: What 'tiny gift' does Grandfather ask Geronimo to deliver to the Red Bandit?
q.zh: 爷爷让杰罗尼摩带给红盗贼的“小礼物”到底是什么？

options.en: A book about Mouse Island according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一本关于老鼠岛的书（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: An enormous jar of Chocolate Cheese Delight
options.zh: 一大罐“巧克力奶酪乐享”

explain.en: Trap reveals the 'tiny gift' is 'an enormousouse jar of chocolate cheese spread' as high as a mouse, called Chocolate Cheese Delight, with thirteen swirled flavors.
explain.zh: 特拉普说那“小礼物”是一大罐巧克力奶酪酱，高得像一只老鼠，名叫“巧克力奶酪乐享”，里面有十三种混合口味。

q.en: In which town did Grandfather buy his cowboy hat at the Silver Cactus shop?
q.zh: 爷爷是在哪座小镇的“银仙人掌”店里买到的牛仔帽？

explain.en: Grandfather says, 'I bought my hat years ago in a little shop in Sedona, Arizona. It was called the Silver Cactus.'
explain.zh: 爷爷说：“我多年前在亚利桑那州塞多纳的一家小店里买到了这顶帽子，那家店叫银仙人掌。”

q.en: Who runs the Silver Cactus shop and gives Geronimo a new hat for Grandfather?
q.zh: 是谁经营着银仙人掌店，并送给杰罗尼摩一顶给爷爷的新帽子？

explain.en: A big gray rodent says, 'My name's Tom. Tom Ratthide,' and later finds the very same Silver Cactus Deluxe hat and gives it to Geronimo for his grandfather.
explain.zh: 一只灰色大老鼠说：“我叫汤姆，汤姆·拉特海德。”后来他找出了同款银仙人掌豪华帽，把它送给了杰罗尼摩带给爷爷。

q.en: How does Poppy Spritely keep mispronouncing Geronimo's last name?
q.zh: 波比·斯普莱特利一直把杰罗尼摩的姓氏念错成什么？

options.zh: 斯提尔顿（她念得完全正确）

explain.en: Again and again Poppy calls him 'Mr. Spilton' (and other twists like Smilton or Skilton) even after Geronimo corrects her: 'The name is Stilton. S-T-I-L-T-O-N.'
explain.zh: 波比一次又一次地叫他“斯皮尔顿先生”（也念错过斯米尔顿、斯基尔顿等），即使杰罗尼摩一再纠正自己的姓氏念法。

q.en: At which landmark did Tom Ratthide say he last saw the Red Bandit?
q.zh: 汤姆·拉特海德说，他最后一次见到红盗贼是在哪座地标？

explain.en: Tom tells Geronimo: 'As for the Red Bandit, start your search at Cathedral Rock. That's where I saw him last.'
explain.zh: 汤姆对杰罗尼摩说：“至于红盗贼，你从大教堂岩开始找吧。我最后一次见到他就是在那里。”

q.en: Who is the 'most daring mouse on Mouse Island' who helps Geronimo with a horse named Lightning?
q.zh: 被称为“老鼠岛上最大胆的老鼠”、并让一匹叫闪电的马帮助杰罗尼摩的是谁？

explain.en: The caption reads 'Wild Willie — The most daring mouse on Mouse Island!' and he tells Geronimo to hop on his wild horse named Lightning.
explain.zh: 书中标注：“野人威利——老鼠岛上最大胆的老鼠！”他让杰罗尼摩骑上他那匹名叫闪电的野马。

q.en: Who is the 'most adventurous mouse on Mouse Island' that guides Geronimo down the Grand Canyon on a mule?
q.zh: 被称为“老鼠岛上最爱冒险的老鼠”、骑着骡子带杰罗尼摩下大峡谷的是谁？

explain.en: The caption reads 'Bruce Hyena — The most adventurous mouse on Mouse Island!' and he has a summer job taking tourists down the canyon on mules.
explain.zh: 书中标注：“布鲁斯·鬣狗——老鼠岛上最爱冒险的老鼠！”他暑假的工作就是骑骡子带游客下大峡谷。

q.en: What two special items does the Red Bandit give Geronimo to bring back to Grandfather?
q.zh: 红盗贼让杰罗尼摩带回给爷爷的两样特别的东西是什么？

options.en: The red bandanna and the falcon's feather
options.zh: 红头巾和一根猎鹰羽毛

options.en: The Silver Cactus hat and a jar according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 银仙人掌帽和一个罐子（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A gold coin and a map

explain.en: The Red Bandit hands Geronimo his red bandanna and pulls the falcon's feather from his hat, saying both are for his friend William as signs of their friendship.
explain.zh: 红盗贼把他的红头巾递给杰罗尼摩，又从帽子上拔下一根猎鹰羽毛，说这两样都是送给朋友威廉的友谊信物。
